entries.title: Forge — Claude Code harness
entries.summary: Installation, update, uninstall, and feature overview for the Forge Claude Code scaffold (v0.3.0). Covers project constitution, all 15 slash commands, 6 hooks, and 14 skills.

entries.title: Working Agreement for Claude
entries.summary: Persistent session rules loaded into every Claude Code conversation: detect-stack, find-reuse, TDD, canonical-sources-first, and project-constitution non-negotiables.

entries.title: Building a Claude Harness — design rationale
entries.summary: Long-form write-up of the harness design: CLAUDE.md + project constitution, 14 skills, subagents, 6 hooks (including post-compact), MCP, settings, and file-level installer ownership.

entries.title: /forge.tasks — decompose a spec into a task list
entries.summary: Slash command: runs task-decomposition skill to produce .forge/NNN-slug/tasks.md. End-of-step AskUserQuestion menu.

entries.title: /forge.clarify — resolve spec ambiguities interactively
entries.summary: Slash command: runs clarify-spec skill, collects all ambiguities at once via AskUserQuestion, and writes .forge/NNN-slug/clarifications.md.

entries.title: /forge.implement — execute a task list in a worktree
entries.summary: Slash command: runs implement-plan skill, creates a git worktree, executes tasks as a single pipeline, presents end-of-run AskUserQuestion menu.

entries.title: task-decomposition skill
entries.summary: Converts a feature spec into a dependency-ordered task list with routing metadata (T-NNN entries).

entries.title: clarify-spec skill
entries.summary: Scans a task list for ambiguities and returns structured questions for the user to resolve.

entries.title: implement-plan skill
entries.summary: Validates the task DAG, resolves routing fields, and produces a per-task routing plan before execution.

entries.title: /forge.constitution — create and manage the project constitution
entries.summary: Slash command: interactive authoring of .forge/constitution.md, injected every session via session-start.sh and post-compact.sh.

entries.title: Project constitution
entries.summary: Soul file: project purpose, non-negotiables, architectural principles, risk posture, team conventions, out-of-scope items. Loaded every session.

entries.title: /forge.research — produce a structured research brief
entries.summary: Slash command: runs research-topic skill to produce a canonical-sources-first research document at .forge/NNN-slug/research.md. Includes official doc citations, codebase findings, options comparison, and a recommendation.

entries.title: research-topic skill
entries.summary: Five-phase research workflow: topic intake, codebase scan, option enumeration via official docs, analysis (feasibility/complexity/risk/fit), and structured document assembly using research-doc-schema.
